audit_scope: OneLake + Fabric + Azure Databricks E2E integration
summary: Infrastructure provisioned but zero data flow operational. Fabric mirroring not configured. Unity Catalog metastore unverified. No data in ADLS. Power BI not deployed.

adls_storage.name: stipaidevlake
adls_storage.block_reason: CLI user lacks Storage Blob Data Reader role

fabric_mirroring.blocker: No Microsoft Fabric capacity provisioned. PG server mirroring feature not enabled.

unity_catalog.blocker: Cannot verify live state -- Databricks CLI blocked

power_bi.blocker: No Power BI Pro/PPU licenses or Fabric capacity provisioned

critical_blockers.description: Fabric mirroring not configured on pg-ipai-odoo (fabricMirroring: null)
critical_blockers.fix: Provision Fabric capacity, enable mirroring on PG server, create mirrored database

critical_blockers.description: UC metastore status is 'pending' -- cannot verify if attached
critical_blockers.fix: Verify via Databricks CLI or UI. If not attached, create and assign metastore.

critical_blockers.description: CLI user lacks Storage Blob Data Reader on stipaidevlake
critical_blockers.fix: Grant Storage Blob Data Reader role to current user

critical_blockers.description: Databricks CLI commands blocked -- cannot verify workspace state
critical_blockers.fix: Re-authenticate via 'databricks auth login' with AAD browser flow

critical_blockers.description: Four different catalog names used across code -- no single canonical name
critical_blockers.fix: Decide on 'ipai' as canonical, update all references

critical_blockers.description: Power BI not deployed -- no business consumption layer
critical_blockers.fix: Provision Power BI Pro/PPU or Fabric capacity, create workspace and semantic models

deprecated_references_in_code.issue: References Notion database IDs and notion-sync artifact (Notion is deprecated)
Contains Notion database ID placeholders and Supabase config (Supabase is deprecated)

minimum_viable_e2e_estimate.prerequisite: Databricks workspace is operational with compute

full_e2e_estimate.phases: 0-6 (all phases including Fabric and Power BI)
full_e2e_estimate.cost: ~$5,000/month for Fabric F64 capacity (or free 60-day trial)
full_e2e_estimate.prerequisite: Budget approval for Fabric capacity + Power BI licenses
